notes: Pair-hybrid cases are explicit local all-algorithms lower bounds in the canonical rotation oracle model.
Johnson cases numerically verify finite positive-adversary matrices only for the standard fixed-weight bit-query oracle.

The finite diagnostic independently executes the tiny true-coherent S3 ladder and the all-arm QPE rank-copy-replay comparator on one harness-owned fixture; it records 28-versus-176 query dominance but keeps composition_match and composition_kill_flag false because the full public confidence/budget interface and delta-sound output contract are absent.

No record establishes continuous-angle Johnson composition, an activity-history direct sum, a matching upper/lower theorem, strongest published-baseline coverage, quantum advantage, or CCF-A readiness.
